_comment: Espionage mission catalogue (§7.1, §15.5, provisional). Accrued intel points (EP) against a target alliance are spent on a mission picked from this table. Per-mission cost = intel_mission_cost × cost_multiplier/100 × (1 + EP_advantage/100); the EP-advantage curve and base interception live in constants.json and are computed in SimFacade. `effect` is the verb SimFacade._espionage_apply dispatches: steal_tech (copy one technology the attacker lacks from the target), sabotage (halve a target city's stored production), incite_unrest (tip the largest target city into disorder for its owner's next turn), steal_gold (transfer up to `amount` gold from the richest target member to the attacker), poison_water (remove 1 population from the largest target city of population >= 2). Each mission is only offered/accepted when its target gate holds (encoded per effect verb in SimFacade._mission_target_valid). `interception_modifier` adds (or subtracts) from the base interception percent before the cap. Magnitudes (`amount`, …) live here so the table is the single source of mission tuning. Spy-unit-on-tile missions are deferred; these are the alliance-scope screen missions.
